novel_features.name: Agent send wrapper
novel_features.description: Send a notification from an argument or stdin with env/config defaults, named priorities, and emergency validation.

novel_features.name: Emergency lifecycle
novel_features.description: Send or monitor an emergency notification receipt, polling acknowledgement status and supporting cancellation.

novel_features.name: Quota cockpit
novel_features.description: Show monthly send limit, remaining sends, and reset time from the app limits endpoint.

novel_features.name: Local notification ledger
novel_features.description: Search and export a local redacted ledger of notifications sent by this CLI and receipt outcomes.

novel_features.name: Inbox sync/search
novel_features.description: Download Open Client messages into local SQLite before optional server-side delete-through.
